title: Baby Reusable Cloth Diaper + FREE 2 Inserts Fits (3kg to 13 - 15kg) Washable and Adjustable Cloth Diaper Waterproof Newborn Cloth Diaper
detail_text: Specifications SKU1523088907_SGAMZ-7122734285Diaper TypeReusableRecommended UserNewborn,InfantsBaby Skin TypeNormal skinOuter MaterialOrganic Cotton Highlights Type : Reusable Cloth Diaper + 2 FREE Insert Material (Outer Layer) : PUL / (Inner Layer) : 100% Polyester Material (Insert) : 88% Polyester, 12% nylon Suitable for 0 - 3 years old (3kg to 13 - 15kg). Depending on baby size and weight One size fits all. You can adjust to your desired size (S, M or L) by snapping onto different rows of buttons on the nappy The elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leakage Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

product.highlights:
• Type : Reusable Cloth Diaper + 2 FREE Insert
  • Material (Outer Layer) : PUL / (Inner Layer) : 100% Polyester
  • Material (Insert) : 88% Polyester, 12% nylon
  • Suitable for 0 - 3 years old (3kg to 13 - 15kg).  Depending on baby size and weight
  • One size fits all.  You can adjust to your desired size (S, M or L) by snapping onto different rows of buttons on the nappy
  • The elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leakage

product.highlights:
• Pupsik Cotton Reusable Training Diapers
  • Three-layered training pants for potty-training toddlers to wear as trainer underwear
  • Fitted elastic diaper around waist and thighs is secure and keep small messes contained
  • Soft absorbent 100% cotton terry cloth inner layer to absorb small accidents
  • TPU water-resistant, leak-proof middle layer to keep accidents in 360°
  • Soft, breathable, hypoallergenic cotton material is skin-friendly and gentle on baby's sensitive and delicate skin
  • Good moisture absorption, anti-leak, heat dissipation
  • Easy to wash, fast-drying
  • M Size: 90cm babies(appeox 18m+), XL size: 110cm (approx 3Y+)

page_json.name: Pupsik Cotton Reusable Training Diapers, 2 Sizes (8 Designs)
page_json.category: Mother & Baby > Diapering & Potty > Cloth Diapers & Accessories
page_json.description: Pupsik. Pupsik Cotton Reusable Training Diapers. Three-layered training pants for potty-training toddlers to wear as trainer underwear. Fitted elastic diaper around waist and thighs is secure and keep small messes contained. Soft absorbent 100 cotton terry cloth inner layer to absorb small accidents. TPU water-resistant, leak-proof middle layer to keep accidents in 360. Soft, breathable, hypoallergenic cotton material is skin-friendly and gentle on baby's sensitive and delicate skin. Good moisture absorption, anti-leak, heat dissipation. Easy to wash, fast-drying. M Size: 90cm babies(appeox 18m, XL size: 110cm approx 3Y

title: 3Pcs Newborn Training Pants Baby Shorts Solid Color Washable BABY Cloth Diapers Reusable Infant Cute and breathable Panties
detail_text: p{margin-block-start: 0; margin-block-end: 0} Size S : 24cm long, waist circumference 19cm, legs circumference 11cm, suitable for Weight within 11kg Size M: 25cm long, waist circumference 20cm, legs circumference 12cm, suitable for Weight 11-15kg This diapers are pure cotton on the outside, and the crotch is 6 layers of cotton + a layer of towel material and TPU waterproof layer. The gauze is soft and absorbs moisture quickly. TPU is waterproof and breathable, and the towel material has a good water locking effect Can be washed and repetitively worn. Study pants are specially designed for training babies to pee. Study pants are different from ordinary underwear. The crotch has thickened water absorption and waterproof design, which can store a part of the urine. In this way, the baby will not flow through the urine after urinating. The floor is everywhere on the floor, only the crotch is wet. When the crotch is wet, the baby will feel uncomfortable. After a long time, the baby will know to take off his pants. He told his mother that he would pee and slowly learn to pee independently.

p{margin-block-start: 0; margin-block-end: 0}

Size S : 24cm long, waist circumference 19cm, legs circumference 11cm, suitable for Weight within 11kg

Size M: 25cm long, waist circumference 20cm, legs circumference 12cm, suitable for Weight 11-15kg



This diapers are pure cotton on the outside, and the crotch is 6 layers of cotton + a layer of towel material and TPU waterproof layer. The gauze is soft and absorbs moisture quickly.
TPU is waterproof and breathable, and the towel material has a good water locking effect
Can be washed and repetitively worn.

Study pants are specially designed for training babies to pee. Study pants are different from ordinary underwear. The crotch has thickened water absorption and waterproof design, which can store a part of the urine. In this way, the baby will not flow through the urine after urinating. The floor is everywhere on the floor, only the crotch is wet. When the crotch is wet, the baby will feel uncomfortable. After a long time, the baby will know to take off his pants. He told his mother that he would pee and slowly learn to pee independently.

Packaged discreetly to safeguard privacy, it blends practicality with comfort for everyday use.

detail_text: 【Description】: -.This is a newly updated reusable cloth diaper, -. breathable, absorbent, soft and comfortable. -.Can effectively prevent the baby from red butt, and can save a lot of money. 【Specification】: -.Material: Pure cotton+Waterproof cloth -.Size: Small size: suitable for weight below 9kg Medium size: suitable for weight 8-12kg Long size: suitable for weight above 12kg 【Package included】:1 pc Baby Diapers(Random Colour) 【Notes】: 1.Please allow 0-3 cm error due to manual measurement. 2.As different computers display colors differently, the color of the actual item may vary slightly from the above images, thanks for your understanding 【How to wash】 Machine washable or hand washable.
detail_html:
【Description】:
-.This is a newly updated reusable cloth diaper,
-. breathable, absorbent, soft and comfortable.
-.Can effectively prevent the baby from red butt, and can save a lot of money.

【Specification】:
-.Material: Pure cotton+Waterproof cloth
-.Size: Small size: suitable for weight below 9kg
Medium size: suitable for weight 8-12kg
Long size: suitable for weight above 12kg

【Package included】:1 pc Baby Diapers(Random Colour)

【Notes】:
1.Please allow 0-3 cm error due to manual measurement.
2.As different computers display colors differently, the color of the actual item may vary slightly from the above images, thanks for your understanding

【How to wash】
Machine washable or hand washable.

Designed as reusable cloth diapers, they offer an eco-friendly alternative to disposables for conscious parents. Their breathable fabric helps keep babies comfortable while preventing leaks, supporting an active and confident toddler. Lightweight and easy to wear, they function as both underwear and training pants, simplifying the transition from diapers. title: Cloth Diaper One Size Snap - Autumn
detail_text: Moo Moo Kow® cloth diaper is healthy for baby’s skin & comfortable, economical, easy to wash and eco-friendly. Using Material that is stay-dry, easy to maintain and getting stain away, suitable for day & night. Suitable for hot weather. Material: PUL (Outer), Suede Cloth (Inner), Microfibre (Inserts) Inserts: Two Stay Dry inserts come with the diapers that help prevent leakage. 1-Year Warranty for every Moo Moo Kow® Diapers: use it with a peace of mind. Comfortable Design: The encased elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leaks, even for heavy wetters, and yet comfortable. Bigger Cutting: The generous cutting can be sized down to fit a baby, and sized up to fit a chubby toddler. Your cloth diaper investment can last much longer. Wide Pocket: The wide pocket means you can stuff more inserts to last a heavy wetter overnight. Different inserts are available for different occasions. Reliable Quality: The high quality PUL fabric can withstand hot washes.
detail_html:
Moo Moo Kow® cloth diaper is healthy for baby’s skin & comfortable, economical, easy to wash and eco-friendly. Using Material that is stay-dry, easy to maintain and getting stain away, suitable for day & night. Suitable for hot weather.


Material: PUL (Outer), Suede Cloth (Inner), Microfibre (Inserts)


Inserts: Two Stay Dry inserts come with the diapers that help prevent leakage.  


1-Year Warranty for every Moo Moo Kow® Diapers: use it with a peace of mind. 





Comfortable Design: The encased elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leaks, even for heavy wetters, and yet comfortable. 


Bigger Cutting: The generous cutting can be sized down to fit a baby, and sized up to fit a chubby toddler. Your cloth diaper investment can last much longer. 


Wide Pocket: The wide pocket means you can stuff more inserts to last a heavy wetter overnight. Different inserts are available for different occasions. 


Reliable Quality: The high quality PUL fabric can withstand hot washes.

page_json.description: Winter Pants for Girls: Super soft, warm, cozy, and comfy to wear. Sweat Alpha Industries: 100% cotton, polyester, spandex, hemp, and more. Black Pants for Girls: White pant for kids, blue pants for girls, grey pants for men, gray pants for boys. Pants for Kids Girls: Super soft and breathable cotton toilet training pant for kids. Baby Underwear Girl: Kids toilet training panties are soft, breathable, and easy to clean. Material, outer 100 cotton, inner cotton and TPU. Design, as pictures

title: Cloth Diaper One Size Snap - Summer
detail_text: Moo Moo Kow® cloth diaper is healthy for baby’s skin & comfortable, economical, easy to wash and eco-friendly. Using Material that is stay-dry, easy to maintain and getting stain away, suitable for day & night. Suitable for hot weather. Inserts: Two Stay Dry inserts come with the diapers that help prevent leakage. 1-Year Warranty for every Moo Moo Kow® Diapers: use it with a peace of mind. Comfortable Design: The encased elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leaks, even for heavy wetters, and yet comfortable. Bigger Cutting: The generous cutting can be sized down to fit a baby, and sized up to fit a chubby toddler. Your cloth diaper investment can last much longer. Wide Pocket: The wide pocket means you can stuff more inserts to last a heavy wetter overnight. Different inserts are available for different occasions. Reliable Quality: The high quality PUL fabric can withstand hot washes.
detail_html:
Moo Moo Kow® cloth diaper is healthy for baby’s skin & comfortable, economical, easy to wash and eco-friendly. Using Material that is stay-dry, easy to maintain and getting stain away, suitable for day & night. Suitable for hot weather.


Inserts: Two Stay Dry inserts come with the diapers that help prevent leakage.  


1-Year Warranty for every Moo Moo Kow® Diapers: use it with a peace of mind. 





Comfortable Design: The encased elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leaks, even for heavy wetters, and yet comfortable. 


Bigger Cutting: The generous cutting can be sized down to fit a baby, and sized up to fit a chubby toddler. Your cloth diaper investment can last much longer. 


Wide Pocket: The wide pocket means you can stuff more inserts to last a heavy wetter overnight. Different inserts are available for different occasions. 


Reliable Quality: The high quality PUL fabric can withstand hot washes.

Wide Pocket: The wide pocket means you can stuff more inserts to last a heavy wetter overnight. Different inserts are available for different occasions. Reliable Quality: The high quality PUL fabric can withstand hot washes.

Moo Moo Kow® cloth diaper is healthy for baby’s skin & comfortable, economical, easy to wash and eco-friendly. Using Material that is stay-dry, easy to maintain and getting stain away, suitable for day & night. Suitable for hot weather.


Inserts: Two Stay Dry inserts come with the diapers that help prevent leakage.  


1-Year Warranty for every Moo Moo Kow® Diapers: use it with a peace of mind. 





Comfortable Design: The encased elastic at the thigh area provide a secure fit to prevent leaks, even for heavy wetters, and yet comfortable. 


Bigger Cutting: The generous cutting can be sized down to fit a baby, and sized up to fit a chubby toddler. Your cloth diaper investment can last much longer. 


Wide Pocket: The wide pocket means you can stuff more inserts to last a heavy wetter overnight. Different inserts are available for different occasions. 


Reliable Quality: The high quality PUL fabric can withstand hot washes.
